# Morning Digest - Friday, May 29, 2026

**Re: Detention Prevention Pilot** | Jhara Ochoa | Urgency: Medium | FYI forward related to ICE Protection Plan pilot scope discussion happening this morning.

**Incomplete Learning Courses dashboard shared** | Rippling/Sarah Kenny | Urgency: Low | Sarah Kenny shared a dashboard of team members with incomplete learning courses.

**Oh no, we ran out of time! | New L&D Tools** | Sarah Kenny | Urgency: Low | Two new L&D tools not covered in Firmwide meeting - a dashboard and an onboarding tool for leaders.

**Leadership Update: Our Commitment Has Not Waivered** | llfcommunications | Urgency: HIGH | A civil lawsuit was filed against LLF. Leadership reaffirmed the firm's mission and commitment. Critical firm-wide context.

**RE: Grievance Case Banner - Priority IT Development** | Sara Watson | Urgency: HIGH | Sara directly asked: "do you think requirements can be done in time?" before sprint kicks off. Needs your response today.

**Re: ICE Protection Plan - Pilot IT requirements + user stories ready for review** | Jhara Ochoa | Urgency: Medium | Jhara onboarded Frank to the project and shared SharePoint IT folder with requirements.

**Friday tasks due soon: 4** | Asana | Urgency: Low | 4 tasks due: 3C Requirements gathering, Define and Build access matrix, Home page content, and one more.

**Venn Full Compliance Rollout** | llfcommunications | Urgency: Medium | Firmwide Venn Wave Launch underway for remote employees. Check your wave assignment.

**Power Automate connection breaks - Ticket Update** | helpdesk | Urgency: Low | A data engineer needs to be involved for flow changes.
